subject: [PATCH 4/8] mm: use zone lock guard in set_migratetype_isolate()

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: No review comments have been made yet.

2026-03-13.patch_summary: This patch series aims to replace explicit lock/unlock patterns in the mm/page_isolation.c file with automatic scope-based cleanup using zone_lock_irqsave scoped guards. The first patch, [PATCH 4/8], targets the set_migratetype_isolate() function, which is responsible for isolating pages from memory hotplug operations.

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: The original author proposed using a scoped lock guard to replace the explicit lock/unlock pattern in set_migratetype_isolate(). The patch aims to improve zone lock handling and reduce the risk of lockdep splats.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series aims to improve the zone lock handling in the mm subsystem, specifically in the set_migratetype_isolate() function. The goal is to replace explicit lock/unlock patterns with automatic scope-based cleanup using a scoped lock guard.
